faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I miss the event?
faqs.answer: Our policy focuses on limited seating. While we don't offer standard refunds for missed sessions, we provide digital recordings and priority access to the next seasonal event.

faqs.question: Will I become profitable after attending TFLCLUB?
faqs.answer: Profitability is a journey of discipline. We provide the institutional framework and live execution strategies used by pros, but your results depend on your risk management and consistency.

faqs.question: Can I learn strategies within 5 days?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our curriculum is stripped of 'retail noise'. We focus on 3 core high-probability setups that can be mastered quickly through our intensive live-trading immersion.

faqs.question: Are there any discounts available?
faqs.answer: We offer early-bird tiers and group rates for teams of 3 or more. Check our official channels for limited-time seasonal codes.

faqs.question: What happens after the season ends?
faqs.answer: You retain lifetime access to the private TFL alumni community, weekly market breakdown calls, and our proprietary indicator suite.

faqs.question: Who is this NOT for?
faqs.answer: This is not for 'get-rich-quick' seekers or those unwilling to unlearn retail trading myths. We require a professional mindset and capital readiness.
